evals.prompt: 我有一份 Markdown 写的内部信息简报，内容别改，帮我生成一份适合内部流转的 Word 版式，标题、期号、正文、一级标题都要像正式简报。
evals.expected_output: Uses the brief preset, preserves source text, generates a .docx, and reports paragraph roles without leaking full source text.

evals.prompt: 这个 docx 内容已经定稿了，只帮我按正式公文习惯调格式：A4、页边距、标题、正文三号仿宋、一级标题黑体、二级标题楷体、首行缩进和固定行距。
evals.expected_output: Uses format-only mode with the formal preset, preserves text order and content, and produces a formatted .docx plus a concise report.

evals.prompt: 我给你一份内部范文和一份新文档，范文不能外露。只学习范文的字体、字号、行距、标题层级和页面边距，把新文档套成同款格式。
evals.expected_output: Uses template-replication mode, extracts a style fingerprint from the template including color/underline/italic when present, avoids quoting template content, reports missing-role fallbacks, and formats the target document.

evals.prompt: 我发你一篇文章，帮我处理一下。
evals.expected_output: Does not guess the operation. Asks the user to choose among format-only, role-identification, and template-replication, recommending format-only if unsure.
